description: 10:45 UTC cycle: coherence insufficient (0.839 from last check), heartbeat health 0.667. Root cause identified: exec preflight blocking complex commands in continuity_30min.sh (uses &&, ||, pipes). This prevents 6 of 18 daily checks from running. Mitigation: documenting in MEMORY; workaround needed -- either allow complex interpreter invocations or wrap multi-step logic in single-binary helper scripts. System operational but health metrics degraded.

changes.description: Node.js exec-safe replacement for continuity_30min.sh — eliminates &&, ||, $(...) shell operators

changes.change: payload.script changed from scripts/continuity_30min.sh to scripts/continuity_runner.js

metrics.root_cause: OpenClaw exec preflight blocks compound shell operators (&&, ||) and unexpanded $(date) substitutions

verification: runner created executable chmod +x; cron payload updated via openclaw cron edit
